title: Hierarchy of Software Development Methods & Methodologies
description: A visual breakdown of how methodologies are composed of methods, showing the relationship between core principles, specific methods, and overarching methodologies.
elements: Core Principles & Practices (e.g., Sprints, User Stories, CI/CD)
relationships: Methodologies are implemented through a combination of specific Methods, which are in turn composed of and guided by Core Principles & Practices.
